sglang.title: [PD] Propagate internal server errors from aborted requests to clients instead of blindly returning 200's
sglang.author: datdo-msft
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Aborted requests that haven't been added to the waiting queue when PD disaggregation is enabled will have their the finish reason as "abort" and the status code as INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR. However, since the tokenizer manager only cares about BAD_REQUEST and SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE status codes

sglang.title: [GLM4.1V and GLM4.5V] Add vision transformer num_dummy_head support: max tp=4 -> max tp=8
sglang.author: byjiang1996
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In some GLM4v models, num_key_value_heads=8 in text attention and num_heads=12 in vision attention so tp=4 is the max supported tp_size today (num_key_value_heads % tp_size == 0 && num_heads % tp_size == 0)
In sglang vision attention, it supports num_dummy_head to help provide dummy atten

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Make `propose_draft_token_ids` non-blocking for lower TTFT
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, using spec decoding increases TTFT from target_model_prefill_time to target_model_prefill_time + draft_model_prefill_time, because the first token is returned together with the draft token ids.
This PR avoids this fake dependency by restructuring the step method, so that the sampled token
